info.title: AKB Director Copilot Source Domain Tools
info.description: Binding read-only contract implemented by STRATOS source applications and consumed only by the AKB server.

post.summary: Execute one governed read-only domain tool

parameters.name: X-STRATOS-Actor-Authorization
parameters.description: Independent current person bearer. The source must verify it and load a fresh STRATOS projection.

200.description: Complete, partial, unavailable or not-authorized governed result.

403.description: Wrong service identity/audience or actor denied

413.description: Request or response exceeds the contract limit

422.description: Contract, scope, entity or policy lineage is invalid

429.description: Bounded source rate or concurrency limit exceeded

503.description: Source read model, access projection or policy decision unavailable
